details.test: Task 1: Morning parasailing booking with optional photos
Task 2: 2-hour speedboat rental with fuel included under $400
Task 3: Parasailing + Jet Ski combo for 3 adults
Task 4: Purchase $150 boat-rentals-only digital gift card with scheduled delivery
Task 5: Reschedule existing parasailing booking to June 17, 2026 at similar time
Task 6: Compare hotel-pickup parasailing tours and book shorter one
Task 7: Private 2-hour sunset cruise with live music and BYOB under $350
Task 8: Read parasailing age limit FAQ and submit clarification contact message
Task 9: Weekday morning parasail and weekend pontoon in same cart
